overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a video game (Assassin's Creed Origins) showing a character in ancient Egyptian Medjay attire running through a desert canyon at night. The scene features red sandstone formations, sparse desert vegetation, and bright moonlight illuminating the path ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: desert canyon floor under bright moonlight

agents.ego_description: character in ancient Egyptian attire running steadily through the desert canyon with moonlight illuminating the path ahead

entered.detail: tall red sandstone cliff face forming the left boundary of the canyon
tall red sandstone cliff face forming the right boundary of the canyon
bright full moon hanging low in the night sky directly ahead
reddish sand covering the canyon floor with visible footprints
small drought-resistant shrubbery scattered along the canyon edges

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with a third-person view following a character running through a wide desert canyon at night. Tall red sandstone walls flank both sides while a bright full moon illuminates the path ahead. The ground is covered in reddish sand with sparse vegetation visible along the edges.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrowing canyon passage with high rock walls

events.description: large isolated rock butte becomes visible in the distance ahead, rising prominently from the canyon floor

agents.ego_description: continuing to run through the canyon as the path curves slightly to the right and the walls close in

entered.detail: massive isolated rock formation with flat top rising from the desert floor ahead

segments.scene_description: As the character progresses deeper into the canyon, the walls appear closer and the sky becomes partially obscured. The moon shifts to the right side of the frame, and a prominent rock butte emerges in the distance ahead, becoming the new focal point of the scene.

scene_state.functional_zone: open desert approach to large rock formation

events.description: moon position shifts behind the character creating a subtle backlit silhouette effect on the canyon walls ahead

agents.ego_description: approaching the large rock formation with steady pace as the canyon opens up again

entered.detail: leafless desert bush visible on the right side of the path

segments.scene_description: The canyon widens again as the character approaches the large rock butte, which now dominates the center of the view. The moon has moved to the right and behind the character, casting long shadows across the sand. Sparse dry vegetation appears along the path as the character continues toward the massive rock formation.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a moonlit desert canyon that gradually narrows before opening up toward a massive rock formation. It begins with a third-person view of a character running between tall red sandstone walls under the glow of a bright full moon. As the character progresses deeper, the canyon walls close in and the sky becomes partially obscured, shifting the moon to the right as a prominent rock butte emerges in the distance. The scene then expands as the character approaches this central landform, which grows to dominate the view while the moon moves behind the character to cast long shadows across the sand. Finally, the path opens further, revealing sparse dry vegetation as the character continues their approach toward the towering rock formation.
